{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lesser Neural Cortex
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10805
|idx=5
|description="...The memory retention of test goldfish has significantly improved, extending to eight seconds. Some samples still record only six seconds—this will be the focus of the next research phase." 
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=720
|def=49
|atk=41
|rush=45
|gene1=In explorations, {race} HP +200
|gene2=During exploration, Water DMG +60
|gene7=Water DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
